_comment: All trades + EOD snapshots. The day_0_baseline is the starting reference for cumulative P&L math. Each EOD snapshot under daily_snapshots is required for next-day day-over-day calculations.

day_0_baseline.note: Day 0 baseline — bot becomes active Monday 2026-05-11.

trades.catalyst: Google I/O 2026 (May 19-20) — new Gemini models, AI Mode in Search, agentic AI. Entry coincided with Stoch K extreme oversold (0.06) inside a full SMA bull stack (price > SMA 20 > SMA 50 > SMA 200).
trades.reasoning: Setup GOOGL-2026-05-20: swing long, entry zone $387-391, stop $376 (logical), target $415, R:R 2.3:1, confidence 6/10. Approved via Discord 2026-05-20 13:28Z. Filled at $387.07 (low end of zone) on a 51-share market buy at 09:51 ET. Post-entry rule: 10% GTC trailing stop placed 15 seconds after fill (order e0b8fbda). The 10% trail floor (~$348.36) is the catch-all; the -7% manual cut ($359.98) is the tighter active guard per CLAUDE.md rule 5.

weekly_trade_count._comment: Resets every Monday 00:00 ET. Used to enforce max-3-trades-per-week rule.

confidence_calibration._comment: predicted-confidence-bucket -> {sample_size, wins, losses}. Empty until we have closed trades.

daily_snapshots.notes: Week 3 Day 3. FIRST FILL of the trading program. GOOGL 51 sh long @ $387.07 (cost $19,740.57), filled 09:51 ET via market order 83bf9678; 10% GTC trailing stop e0b8fbda placed 15s later — post-entry order rule satisfied. EOD: GOOGL $388.54, unrealized +$74.97 (+0.38%). Equity $100,073.95, P&L today +$73.95 (+0.07%), deployed 19.8% (within risk: single position 19.8% < 20% cap). GOOGL is a SWING — held overnight, not a day trade, no close required. daytrade_count reported as 1 by Alpaca — attributable to the same-day buy + GTC trailing-stop pair on GOOGL; no actual round-trip occurred. Equity > $25k so PDT does not bind; benign. Pre-Trade Buy Gate: all 8 checks passed at entry (1 position, 1/3 weekly, 19.8% < 20% cap, cost < cash, daytrade ok, I/O catalyst documented, Communication Services not blocklisted, equity instrument). Day-trade close step had nothing to close. Hard rule violations: NONE. Daily loss cap: not approached. MSFT half-trigger 1/2 — MACD histogram improved to -0.3212 EOD (from -0.5435 on 5/19); SMA 20 reclaim solid ($420.99 > $416.76). Stale-by 5/22 EOD, 1 session left. NVDA Q1 FY27 earnings AMC tonight — no semiconductor exposure (correct). EOD routine fired correctly on time (~3:46 PM ET) — earlier 9:45 AM EOD misfire was pre-fill and superseded. Infra: ta package installed cleanly via setuptools+wheel upgrade workaround. RuFlo MCP unavailable (file-only mode). Discord unprovisioned (discord_config.json + DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN missing) — brief logged to pending_discord_updates.md.
